extraction.one_line_summary: HINDLEY Jai defended yellow on Mount Buller's 17km final climb, countering BERWICK Seth's attacks in final 500m to win stage and extend GC lead to 10 seconds
tactical_patterns: Team Sunweb massed at peloton front to control break gap under 3:30, preventing dangerous 2:32-down RUSH from threatening GC
BERWICK attacked from third wheel on steepest gradients targeting HINDLEY's weakness rather than rhythm climbing, forcing yellow jersey to respond
HINDLEY waited until final 150m inside barriers to counter rather than chase, using positional advantage over raw power

rider_signals.BERWICK Seth: positive: 20-year-old riding aggressively to pressure race leader, closing gap from 16 seconds to 10 despite losing stage
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: quickly overtaken after attacking, unable to sustain acceleration when U23 riders counterattacked on steep gradients
rider_signals.WHELAN James: negative: bad day dropped him out of top-10 contention despite previously strong GC position
rider_signals.VINE Jay: positive: U23 rider finishing ahead of multiple World Tour pros including former winner HOWSON on selective 17km climb
rider_signals.RUSH Jonas: positive: survived longest from break on final climb, still mixing with favorites despite starting from early move
